def positive_pickle_dumps_in_loop_same_structure():
    rule_id = "pickle_dumps_in_loop_same_structure"
    family = "hot_path_ext"
    severity = "info"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "pickle.dumps(...) is called repeatedly for the same structural shape in a loop."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
